title: Document .meta.json sidecars and --level flag in standard/conformance/README.md
acceptance_criteria: standard/conformance/README.md explains the .meta.json sidecar file format (fields: level, producer/exchange/host expectations).
README documents the --level=<1|2|3|all> runner flag, including what each level filters.
Readme includes at least one command example showing --level usage.
Existing README sections (installation, running validators) are preserved unchanged.
definition_of_done: The README is updated and all existing standard/ tests still pass; no source code is modified.
